title: OKX and Intercontinental Exchange Launch Regulated U.S. Blockchain Joint Venture
message_html: OKX and Intercontinental Exchange Launch Regulated U.S. Blockchain Joint Venture ...
snippet: Blockchain company OKX has launched a joint venture with New York Stock Exchange owner Intercontinental Exchange. title: Tokenized RWA market cap rises 40% to top $51 billion as industry races to define equity tokenization model
message_html: Tokenized RWA market cap rises 40% to top $51 billion as industry races to define equity tokenization model ...
snippet: Tokenized RWA market cap tops $51 billion as equity tokenization grows 130% and firms race to define the winning business model.

title: Enso launches RWA app and trading for over 500 tokenized assets
message_html: Enso launches RWA app and trading for over 500 tokenized assets ...
snippet: Enso launched access to over 500 tokenized assets and US stocks, citing a growing demand for US equity exposure among European investors.
